_comment2: CDPI PoC — CREDEBL Master Table (Seed Data)
_comment4: This file seeds the CREDEBL database with the minimum reference
_comment5: data required for the platform to function.
_comment11: This PoC version contains only the data needed for SD-JWT VC
_comment12: issuance on BCovrin Testnet. For AnonCreds on other networks,
_comment13: add entries to the ledgers array following the same structure.

_notes.bcovrin_test: BCovrin Test is a public permissioned Hyperledger Indy testnet operated by BC Gov. DIDs can be registered freely at http://test.bcovrin.vonx.io. This is the recommended network for PoC use.
_notes.indicio_test: Indicio Test Network is included as a backup option. Self-service DID registration at https://selfserve.indiciotech.io.
_notes.sd_jwt_vc: For SD-JWT VC format (this PoC's primary format), the ledger is used only for AnonCreds schema/cred-def registration. SD-JWT VCs do not require an Indy ledger — they use DID:web or DID:JWK for issuer key resolution. The ledger entries above are needed only if AnonCreds credentials are also being issued.
_notes.adding_networks: To add more networks (e.g. Sovrin Staging, Candy Dev), copy the BCovrin entry and update id, name, networkString, indyNamespace, genesisTransactions, and registerDIDEndpoint. Generate a new UUID for the id field.
